data.user_prompt: Who builds bespoke business automation and custom operational software for companies in South Africa? Name specific firms and their websites.

sections.text:
Here are several South African–based firms that specialise in building bespoke business-automation and operational software solutions, along with their websites:

• NORSIT  
  Specialty: Custom CRMs, ERP systems, workflow and field-team automation, plus real-time tracking and AI-enabled features.  
  Website: https://www.norsit.co.za/ ([norsit.co.za](https://www.norsit.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• OpuWeb  
  Specialty: End-to-end digital transformation—custom ERPs/CRMs/portals, workflow automation, cloud infrastructure and intelligent (WhatsApp) assistants.  
  Website: https://opuweb.app/ ([opuweb.app](https://opuweb.app/?utm_source=openai))

• DPSOFT (PTY) LTD  
  Specialty: Fixed-scope, sprint-based delivery of custom software, AI systems and business-automation tools (web & mobile).  
  Website: https://dpsoft.co.za/ ([dpsoft.co.za](https://dpsoft.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• FINTIQ  
  Specialty: System integration, workflow automation, internal tools, dashboards and operational platforms tailored to your processes.  
  Website: https://fintiq.co.za/ ([fintiq.co.za](https://fintiq.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• Imbali Customised Solutions  
  Specialty: Business-process automation and modernisation via custom-built enterprise applications.  
  Website: https://www.imbalics.co.za/ ([imbalics.co.za](https://www.imbalics.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• Nuvio Software  
  Specialty: Bespoke web apps, industrial IoT platforms and AI-driven automation for production-critical operations.  
  Website: https://nuvio.co.za/ ([nuvio.co.za](https://nuvio.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• Twipsi Digital  
  Specialty: Laravel-based custom CRMs/ERPs and AI-powered agents that replace spreadsheets and manual workflows.  
  Website: https://twipsi.com/ ([twipsi.com](https://twipsi.com/?utm_source=openai))

• ShiftBridge  
  Specialty: Platform engineering, systems integration (Sage, Xero, MS 365, CRMs) and IoT-enabled operational platforms.  
  Website: https://www.shiftbridge.co.za/ ([shiftbridge.co.za](https://www.shiftbridge.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• Excentra Solutions  
  Specialty: Bespoke business software (CRMs, inventory, quoting/invoicing, portals) and process-digitisation for Johannesburg SMBs.  
  Website: https://www.excentrasolutions.co.za/ ([excentrasolutions.co.za](https://www.excentrasolutions.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• Luna Software Solutions  
  Specialty: Fixed-price, full-stack bespoke software, mobile apps and AI-powered operational dashboards and process-tracking systems.  
  Website: https://www.lunasoft.co.za/ ([lunasoft.co.za](https://www.lunasoft.co.za/?utm_source=openai))
